name: dev-commander-marketplace
description: Local marketplace hosting the Dev Commander plugin.

plugins.name: dev-commander
plugins.description: An AI-assisted software development agent. Skills span workspace orchestration, multi-stack project scaffolding, architecture design, incremental implementation planning, test-first implementation, rubric-driven code review, root-cause debugging, branch and PR workflow, release management, governed lesson capture, security scanning, CI pipeline generation, handoff to Test Commander, container publishing, and multi-target deployment.
